title: Easy Elegant Norwegian Shrimp Skewers
description: A quick and flavorful Norwegian dish featuring jumbo shrimp, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with a pungent and glassy-jelly texture from the combination of soy sauce and honey, and buddhist-temple-friendly as it does not contain any animal products except for the shrimp, and score-fat is not used in this recipe as it is not a traditional Norwegian ingredient.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Add the garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Grill the shrimp skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh parsley if desired.
